results.title: Who does Cristiano Ronaldo play for? What to know about ...
results.search_query: In which club does cristiano ronaldo play
results.content:
Portugal's best finish during Ronaldo's international career came in 2006, when they reached the semifinals and ultimately placed fourth. Since then, Ronaldo has featured at five additional World Cups but has yet to lead his country to the sport's biggest prize.

While World Cup glory has eluded him, Ronaldo has helped Portugal achieve historic success on the international stage, captaining his country to the UEFA European Championship title in 2016 and UEFA Nations League triumphs in 2019 and 2025.

## What club team does Cristiano Ronaldo play for?

Ronaldo plays for Saudi Pro League side Al Nassr, having joined the club in December 2022 following his departure from Manchester United.
